CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( Date_Initial_Controls_Expire__c ) = FALSE, Date_Initial_Controls_Expire__c - 180, test_date_controls_expire__c - 180)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date initial controls expire minus 180 days, or Date Controls Expire (Calculated) minus 180 days.
CustomField.label: 180 Days Before Controls Expire
